steps.t: Khâmi has asked you to take their broken wheel to Iridír to have it repaired. You should pick up the waggon wheel.
You have the broken waggon wheel. You should find someone in Iridír who can repair it.
You have completed the work of the absent apprentice, and Aranbir says the wheel is repaired. You should pick up the wheel to bring it back to Khâmi a…
You have taken the broken wheel to Iridír and had it repaired. You should return it to Khâmi at Gha Nêkha, south-west of Eshadûr.
